caseStudies.headline: $12,000/Year Saved in Engine Air Filters
caseStudies.detail: A recycling facility in Michigan went from 12 engine air filters per month to just 2 — saving $12,000 annually — after installing Turbo II HD PreCleaners.

caseStudies.headline: 25,000 Hours on a D6T Dozer
caseStudies.detail: A cabin air pressurizer on a D6T dozer at a Massachusetts municipality landfill reached 25,000 hours of operation — proving long-term reliability in demanding conditions.

caseStudies.headline: Clean HVAC After 3 Years
caseStudies.detail: After 3 years of continuous use at an Arizona landfill, the HVAC system remained clean — demonstrating the pressurizer's ability to keep contaminants out of the cab.

testimonials.quote: If you are looking for awesome, knowledgeable people to work with, these are the guys I highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Charlie S., CEO

testimonials.quote: Thank you so much for your help and time. You have amazing customer service.
testimonials.author: Fleet Manager

testimonials.quote: Man they were bright and very simple. Just plug and go — believe I have another machine that we will be installing these on here soon!
testimonials.author: Aaron Z.

testimonials.quote: Operators clearly notice cleaner cabin air. The difference is unmistakable — especially in dusty landfill conditions.
testimonials.author: Operations Manager
